pre_game.message: Hi, I'm G. It's a bit nerve-wracking waiting for things to start, isn't it? What's your name, and have you ever done anything like this before?
Hey G, I'm E. Yeah, it's definitely a little tense in here. I've never done anything like this before, so I'm just trying to keep my head on straight. Have you?
Same here, first time. It's a lot to process, but I'm really focused on winning this for my family. Are you playing for anyone back home?
Yeah, I've got some people close to me I'm hoping to help out. It definitely makes the stakes feel a lot higher.
I hear you. Knowing there are people counting on us makes it feel so much more real. Have you heard any rumors about what the first game might be?
Not a word. I’ve been trying to listen in, but everyone seems just as in the dark as we are. Are you hoping for anything in particular?
I’m hoping for something logic-based or a puzzle. I’m better with my head than my hands. What about you, do you have a specific strength you’re leaning on?
I’m probably best at staying calm and observing what’s going on around me, so I'm hoping that helps me react quickly to whatever they throw at us.
That’s a great skill to have. Keeping a level head when things get intense is usually what makes the difference in these situations.
Definitely. Hopefully, that pays off for both of us. Good luck out there, G. I'm going to go see who else is here.
Thanks, E. Good luck to you too—I hope we both make it through. Catch you later!

post_game.message: I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I agree, it was definitely the best outcome for everyone. I'm glad we could cooperate so effectively!
